headline: Exxon Guyana Expansion Puts Stabroek Growth And Risks In Focus
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) is expanding development of the Stabroek Block offshore Guyana, one of the largest recent oil discoveries in the Western Hemisphere. The company has reiterated plans to focus capital on Guyana while ruling out investments in neighboring Venezuela. Growing production from Stabroek is drawing scrutiny over environmental risks, local poverty, corruption concerns, and territorial disputes involving Venezuela and Suriname. Exxon and the U.S. government are now more actively...
